quote: What's he up to man? What's he doing?
author: Lalo Salamanca

quote: Does this steaming pile of crap scream payday to you? The only way that car is worth $500 is if there is a $300 hooker in it.
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Don't let Mr. Ehrmantraut's dancing eyes and bubbly, bon vivant personality fool you. He's actually, believe it or not, somewhat taciturn.
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Can we all three of us parachute down from cloud cuckoo land?
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Thank you for restoring my faith in the judicial system, now you either pay the $3 or you go back inside.
author: Mike Ehrmantraut

quote: Kingbreaker...so that makes me the king!  WOO-HOO!
author: Tuco Salamanca

quote: Can I ask you sum'n?  Personal, kind of.  You're a lawyer.  You make good money, right?  Legit money, on the level.  Your wife's a lawyer.  A legit lawyer.  Why you do all this?
author: Huell Babineaux

quote: Think I would be caught dead in that thing?  It looks like a school bus for six year-old pimps
author: Nacho Varga

quote: Pimento is a cheese.  They call it the caviar of the south.
author: Mike Ehrmantraut

quote: So when you're sitting in your shitty nursing hoe sucking down jello night after night for the rest of your life, you think of ME, you twisted fuck!
author: Nacho Varga

quote: Let justice be done though the heavens fall
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: It's showtime!
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: There are so many stars visible in New Mexico.  I will walk out there to get a better look.
author: Werner Ziegler

quote: Let's get down to brass tacks here.
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: He defecated through a sunroof!
author: Chuck McGill

quote: OK, enough carrot.
author: Kim Wexler

quote: You don't save me.  I save me.
author: Kim Wexler

quote: But you underestimated just how big an idiot you were dealing with.
author: Mike Ehrmantraut

quote: Hey, I just talked you down from a death sentence to six months' probation.  I'm the best lawyer ever.
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Thing you folks need to know about me?  I got nothing to lose.  Christ, you should see my office.
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Blow my magic flute
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Tell me again.
author: Lalo Salamanca

quote: Slippin' Jimmy with a law degree is like a chimp with a machine gun.
author: Chuck McGill

quote: Wait 'til you see what I use to floss
author: Jimmy McGill

quote: Cucumber water for customers only!
author: Mrs. Nguyen
